name: customer-segmentation-skill
description: Segment e-commerce customers into behavioral groups using K-means clustering on RFM features. Returns labeled segments with actionable marketing strategies.
author: alphaparkinc

customers.description: Customer records with recency_days, frequency, monetary_value, and optional demographic fields.

features.description: Features to use for clustering (default: recency, frequency, monetary).

segments.description: Segment definitions with customer counts, feature averages, labels, and marketing strategies.

customers.description: Customer records with assigned segment labels.
